hotel_name: Lynn Times Thanh Thủy - My Home (Lynn Times Thanh Thuy - My Home)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Secret hotel, hot design. Crowded. Tiring.

reviews.title: Not recommend to book this kind of room and service for family
reviews.positives: The hotel provided hot spring service in the room
reviews.negatives: I stayed at hotel actually, but they cancelled my booking on system. I booked the room that is not required prepayment, but staff called me and required to pay. The room is small with 2 tiny beds same as the size in hospital. The staff didn’t clean the rubbish of the previous customers

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The service is nothing. There's nothing to eat or drink, eating out is quite expensive. The elevator is slow, the pool is small, there are no air conditioners in the hallway, I won't come back here again.

reviews.title: gutes Hotel wenn man nicht am Wochenende bzw. Feiertage hinfährt
reviews.positives:
Pool mit Thermalwasser auf Balkon
Swimmingpool auf Dach
reviews.negatives: am Wochenende und Feiertage ist das Hotel überfüllt und der Service schlechter mit höheren Preisen

reviews.title: Beautiful location with a view of the Da River.
reviews.text: The positive point is the beautiful view of the Da River, and there is a mineral bath, but when I went during the holiday, there was no water in the room due to high demand, so I couldn't enjoy it. The check-in service was super poor because the room on Agoda was listed as Lynn Times but was actually a privately owned apartment, so the receptionist said it wasn't in their booking system and I had to contact the owner myself to get the code. It feels like renting from an apartment like this doesn’t come with good support and feels uncomfortable. If you come here, it is better to avoid holidays for a better experience.

reviews.title: 长期住可以，只住一两天不合适
reviews.negatives: 办入住特别麻烦，还是在有本地朋友帮忙的情况下，办理入住花费了30-40分钟。退房也很慢，因为需要安排员工去查房！

reviews.title: Needs some work
reviews.text: The wifi doesn't work in the room, just in the lobby. The pool closes before the listed time. The 24/7 store closes in the evening
reviews.response: Cám ơn quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Lynn Times Thanh Thủy - My Home, Hiện tại mạng wifi của chúng tôi có hoạt động trong phòng và cũng tương đối mạnh, tuy nhiên sẽ không mạnh bằng ngoài hành lang. Hy vọng sớm gặp lại quý khách trong chuyến nghỉ dưỡng tiếp theo.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Gia đình tôi đặt 2 phòng, nhưng được sắp xếp quá xa nhau

reviews.title: The service is not good.
reviews.text: The host mistakenly registered the guest's name, causing the check-in to take a considerable amount of time. The communal bathroom has a strong urine smell.

reviews.title: Vừa chán vừa mệt
reviews.positives: Nhà hàng trong khách sạn OK
reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi không thoải mái, bãi gửi ô tô vừa xa vừa nắng vừa bẩn, khách sạn gì bắt đặt cọc tiền mặt !

reviews.title: Relatively good if it's for a resort vacation.
reviews.text: This rental unit belongs to an individual but is still operated and managed by the hotel. The hotel building is located within the grounds of the Lynn Times Thanh Thuy tourist area. My room has a direct view of the Da River, which is quite beautiful. The room is relatively clean, with a mineral bath in the room. The design is gentle. There is a pool on the 32nd floor, which is quite nice and safe for small children. A downside is that the room is a bit small, and the bed is also small. Soundproofing is poor, as you can hear clearly the sounds of walking and conversations in the hallway. The hotel's location is also quite remote, not convenient for travel, only suitable for leisure tourism. There are two parking areas, one close and one by the river which is very far. There is a shuttle service from the parking lot to the hotel. The staff is also very enthusiastic, but the wait time is a bit long. There is a separate check-in and check-out area. The restaurant is on the first floor but only offers a buffet, which is quite boring, with no other options. The hotel lobby is quite large and fragrant. There are many tables and chairs to sit and relax while waiting for check-in.

reviews.title: Công ty vận hành khách sạn chưa chuyên nghiệp. Chỉ quay lại khi đúng là Wyndham vận hành
reviews.positives: Phòng khách sạn có bể onsen muối khoáng riêng
reviews.negatives:
- tôi vừa ở đây 12-14/7/2025
-Check in và check out quá lâu. Tôi check in mất 2 tiếng, check out mất 30 phút. Các người khác cũng vậy. Lý do nhân viên bảo do họ không chính thức liên kết với Booking.com và Agoda…ai đặt qua đó sẽ làm thủ tục rất lâu
- khách đông (40-50 khách khác đoàn đến cùng lúc) nhưng cũng chỉ có 4 nhân viên check in
- Nhân viên không chuyên nghiệp, quy trình giải quyết công việc không hợp lý khiến cho khách hàng lúc nào cũng ùn ứ, nhìn sảnh Ks đông không khác gì ở sân bay.
- Không có các hướng dẫn vị trí các khu vực trong khách sạn
- Không có điện thoại bàn để liên lạc với lễ tân trong phòng
- không có bảng dịch vụ và giá
- ngày thường (thứ 2) không phục vụ nước cho khách khi check in. 
- Dịch vụ onsen giá đắt nhưng chất lượng không tương xứng. Không có hướng dẫn sử dụng dịch vụ, vệ sinh chưa sạch.

reviews.title: How the housekeeping department works.
reviews.text: I rated this place 3 out of 5, but the reason my outing turned bad is because of the housekeeping staff. On the first day, while cleaning the room, they took it upon themselves to touch my bag. I don't know if it was accidental or intentional, but my bag was open and left on the table next to the TV, and there was quite a bit of money inside, which they took and put away with other bags. They swept the floor but ignored the trash right next to where I was lying, and the plate rack in the restroom was also not put back on the table. Even a 3-star hotel would know how to tidy things up as if they were new. Until the day I was leaving, I forgot a personal water bottle, and I never received a call to inform me about the forgotten item. I discovered it an hour away on the road and had to turn back to look for it. It's truly disappointing because of this department.

reviews.title: Phù hợp với chi phí
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ phù hợp với người lớn đi nghỉ dưỡng. Nhà có trẻ em thì ko nên vì tối ở đây khá buồn

reviews.title: Resort
reviews.text: The room is clean and well-equipped. It took a long time for the staff to prepare the room; we checked in at 2 PM but the room was ready at 3 PM.

reviews.title: Khu nghỉ dưởng trên mức trung bình
reviews.positives: Tôi thích nhất vì có bể tắm nước nóng tại phòng
reviews.negatives: Tôi không thích vì không có bữa sáng

reviews.title: Winter vacation is okay.
reviews.text: The room has a hot tub on the balcony with warm water. Quite comfortable. The room is reasonably clean. It's okay for a hot spring vacation. There are many restaurants around, quite similar, with high prices for everything. Most restaurants offer a shuttle service to the building's entrance. Service is okay. The area is mainly for walking and soaking in hot springs. Overall, it's nice in a not-so-beautiful area, surrounded by residential neighborhoods.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Trải nghiệm khu phức hợp nhiều dịch vụ
reviews.negatives: Dịch vụ kém: sai tên phòng, thủ tục rườm rà, chậm chạp để khách phải chờ lâu. Sai sót thì bộ phận vận hành và chủ phòng đổ lỗi cho nhau và bắt khách hàng tự giải quyết.

reviews.title: Nice accommodation
reviews.text: New facilities, clean room, having many restaurants and stores around

reviews.title: Tạm được
reviews.positives: Có khoáng tại phòng, nước nóng đạt chuẩn
reviews.negatives:
Check in bị muộn, mình có 2 phòng mà 2h30 mới đc 1 phòng, 2h45 có phòng còn lại.
Xe điện ít, bãi để xe cá nhân khá xa

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Luxurious apartment based hotel
Reasonably priced & excellent quality restaurant
Good complex facilities

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.positives: Về cơ bản là tốt mọi vấn đề
reviews.negatives: Cung Đường từ Hà Nội đi lên khu đó còn nhiều đoạn xấu quá nếu không chắc sẽ tuyệt hảo, trọn vẹn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is suitable for the price, very crowded, so check-in and check-out at the lobby takes a long time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Bể bơi sạch sẽ, phòng ngủ mới

reviews.title: Worth a 1-2 night stay.
reviews.text: A destination worth visiting, about 60-70km from Hanoi, with easy access by car and many local specialties along the way. An ideal resort for a 2-3 day stay, everything is clean, the scenery is beautiful, the staff is polite, and the service is efficient. The food at the smaller restaurants is not very good, so it's better to eat in the hotel or at the larger restaurants in the area.

reviews.title: toẹt dời
reviews.positives: mỗi phòng đều có bồn tắm khoáng nên t rất thích, chỉ có điều là hơi khó khăn 1 chút khi phải vặn van và đóng van mở nước tại hơi nước quá mạnh. đặc biệt dịch vụ siêu tuyệt vời, nhất là bể bơi vô cực trên tầng 32!
reviews.negatives: mỗi phòng đều có bồn tắm khoáng nên t rất thích, chỉ có điều là hơi khó khăn 1 chút khi phải vặn van và đóng van mở nước tại hơi nước quá mạnh. đặc biệt dịch vụ siêu tuyệt vời, nhất là bể bơi vô cực trên tầng 32!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The accommodation is very clean, the river view is beautiful and private, the hot spring water is clear, and my children really liked it. If we come again, we will choose to stay here again.

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation
reviews.text: The family had a satisfying 3-day, 2-night vacation. The room was clean, the staff were friendly and enthusiastic, and there were many rich experiences with mineral baths!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
We arrived yesterday expecting to be in a luxury hotel. Unfortunately, it turned out to be a complete nightmare.

It took over 2 hours to get me a room even though the hotel was empty. Now I understand why.

When I arrived, they tried to steal my money by making me pay double the price.

I asked to see the manager. This person made us wait more than 1h30 in the lobby without even offering a coffee. This person did not apologize,never. She pretended not to understand by saying that our reservation was wrong when I simply wanted a double bed even though the hotel is completely empty and this room costs less.

But it's not over. The next day the weather is not good we have no choice but to stay an extra night. The hot spring which is already not working very well is under maintenance. In addition to all the inconvenience we ask for a gesture (a cocktail, a massage, a discount whatever). The host on booking tells us that for him everything is fine and that he was kind to offer us another room. It's a scandal. Also the air conditioning needs to be reviewed, the fresh air does not work very well, the air conditioning works all day at maximum but the room is barely cool. We hoped to be able to rest for a few days in the end we were stressed. I never put any negative reviews, I am not a demanding customer but we were extremely badly received I will never come back. If you would like take have a drink after 6pm the bar is close.
I've been traveling several months a year for years, and I've never experienced such an horrible reception. I booked with Booking.com. If you want to go, good luck.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, tiện ích đầy đủ, giá hợp lý

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.negatives: Water in swimming pool is so cold

reviews.title: Family vacation
reviews.text: Affordable, clean and beautiful, with many experiences for young children.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The host is nice, the room is beautiful and clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is good, the reception staff are very attentive, Diem, Thanh, Dao, Lien, Huong, and My Mai provide excellent service.
reviews.response: Cám ơn bạn Trang đã dành tình cảm yêu mến cho Lynn Times Thanh Thủy, mong bạn tiếp tục ghé thăm bên mình trong những kỳ nghỉ kế tiếp của gia đình ạ

reviews.title: The mineral pool on the balcony has a very beautiful view.
reviews.text: Personal apartments for rent are cheaper than rooms booked directly from hotels, the mineral pool on the balcony is great for relaxation and enjoying the scenery of mountains and the Da River.
reviews.response: Em rất vui vì chị đã có trải nghiệm tuyệt với ở Lynn Times Thanh Thủy, em rất mong được gặp lại chị ở những kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo của chị ạ

reviews.title: Relaxation
reviews.text: The service at the hotel is very attentive and friendly. The staff is always ready to assist customers with a warm, professional attitude. The room is fully equipped, clean, and comfortable. Although not very spacious, the space is cozy and well-designed, creating a pleasant atmosphere. The bed is soft, and the bathroom is thoroughly cleaned.
reviews.response: cám ơn Chi Nga đã lựa chọn dịch vụ của Wyndham Lynn Times Thanh Thủy, rất mong được đón tiếp chị vào lần tới ạ

reviews.title: Lưu trú

reviews.text: chỗ ở cũng ôkie nhưng đang ngủ 8h sáng bị đánh thức vì việc dọn phòng
